violations.description: Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Bacon, mushrooms and onions at 112F.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Need for quat sanitizer.
Water Supply. — --Water source or system was not of sufficient capacity to meet the demands of the food establishment. -Water pipes froze.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -No water supply. Pipes broken using temp set-up. See published comments
